# Sahadhyayi

> Sahadhyayi (Sanskrit for "fellow reader") is a digital reading community and online book library. Readers discover books, track reading progress, join reading groups, write articles, and connect with fellow book lovers worldwide.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of the Sahadhyayi reading community and features.
- [About](/about): Mission, values, and the meaning of Sahadhyayi.
- [Library](/library): Browse thousands of books in the digital library.
- [Authors](/authors): Verified authors directory with profiles and works.
- [Articles](/articles): Community-written articles, essays, and reading insights.
- [Blog](/blog): Editorial blog covering reading culture and book recommendations.
- [Reading Groups](/groups): Book-specific discussion groups and clubs.
- [Reader Map](/map): Discover readers and reading groups near you.
- [Games](/games): Book quizzes, badges, and leaderboards.
- [Discovery](/discovery): Personalized book and reader discovery feed.
- [Social](/social): Social feed, friends, and groups for readers.

## Articles & Authors (dynamic)

- [Article example](/articles/sahadhyayi-is-a-book-readers-social-media): Example community article.
- [Author profile example](/author/rabindranath-tagore): Example author profile page.
- [Book detail example](/book/): Individual book detail pages live under /book/:id.

## Legal & Help

- [Help Center](/help-center): Help articles and FAQs.
- [Community Guidelines](/community-guidelines): Posting and conduct rules.
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy-policy): How we handle user data.
- [Terms of Service](/terms-of-service): Terms governing use of the platform.
- [Cookie Policy](/cookie-policy): Cookie usage and consent details.
- [Feedback](/feedback): Submit feedback or contact the team.

## Optional

- [Publish a Book](/publish): Submit your own book to the library (auth required).
- [Write an Article](/articles/write): Compose and publish an article (auth required).
